Notes: Add an A RR at an owner that already has a CNAME. Prerequisite name_in_use is satisfied by the existing CNAME owner; the UPDATE then attempts to add incompatible data at the same owner. Follow-up QUERYs check whether the server rejected the UPDATE and preserved the CNAME-only state or accepted/partially applied it.

Steps.Description: Prerequisite passes because alias.campus.edu. is already in use. Attempt to add an A RR at the same owner that currently owns a CNAME, which would violate RFC 2181 name-level exclusivity if applied.

Steps.Name: alias.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the existing CNAME remains present after the UPDATE.

Steps.Name: alias.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the conflicting A RR was installed or suppressed.
